name: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Router 5G Max
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Router 5G Max
short_description: Desktop cloud gateway with 5G support, WiFi 7, 4x 2.5 GbE LAN, 1x 10G SFP+, 802.3af PoE out, USB-C, RouterOS L4
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Router 5G Max is designed to deliver powerful, high-speed connectivity for modern networks. It integrates advanced 5G technology with peak download speeds reaching up to 3.4 Gbps, supports WiFi 7, and features a 4-port 2.5 GbE switch, a 10G SFP+ port, and advanced firewall and VPN capabilities.

detailed_description.heading: High-Speed Gateway
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Router 5G Max is designed to deliver powerful, high-speed connectivity for modern networks that demand flexibility and reliability. As a desktop cloud gateway, it integrates advanced 5G technology with peak download speeds reaching up to 3.4 Gbps, ensuring fast and stable internet access even in environments where traditional wired connections are limited or unavailable. Supporting both standalone and non-standalone 5G modes, the device provides versatile deployment options for different network conditions. It also maintains backward compatibility with 4G LTE and 3G networks, ensuring uninterrupted connectivity across a wide range of coverage scenarios. With support for multiple frequency bands and dual Nano SIM functionality, users can easily configure redundant or optimized mobile connections for improved reliability.

detailed_description.heading: High-Speed Gateway (Part 2)
detailed_description.text: The integrated WiFi 7 capability enhances wireless performance across multiple frequency ranges, delivering improved efficiency and higher throughput for connected devices. This makes the router suitable for bandwidth intensive applications such as cloud services, video streaming, and real time collaboration. Advanced antenna design further strengthens signal coverage, helping maintain stable connections throughout the workspace. With support for over 300 simultaneous users and coverage of up to 160 square meters, the UniFi Dream Router 5G Max is built to handle dense environments without compromising performance. Whether deployed in a professional office or a demanding home setup, it ensures seamless connectivity and consistent network quality.

detailed_description.heading: Intelligent Traffic Management
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Dream Router 5G Max is equipped with a comprehensive set of advanced networking and security features designed to provide full control and protection of your network environment. At its core is a powerful stateful firewall combined with a Layer 7 firewall, enabling deep inspection and filtering of network traffic based on applications, domains, and regions. Built-in intrusion detection and prevention systems enhance network security by monitoring traffic patterns and blocking potential threats in real time. With access to over 20,000 threat signatures, the system provides robust protection without requiring additional licenses. Additional features such as content filtering and ad blocking allow administrators to maintain a safer and more controlled browsing environment.

detailed_description.heading: Intelligent Traffic Management (Part 2)
detailed_description.text: For secure remote access, the device supports multiple VPN technologies, including WireGuard, OpenVPN, IPsec, and L2TP. Zero configuration VPN options simplify deployment, making it easy to establish secure connections between users and networks. Site to site VPN capabilities further enable seamless communication between different locations, supporting distributed business operations. The router also includes advanced traffic management tools such as dynamic routing, quality of service optimization, and multi-WAN load balancing. These features ensure efficient bandwidth allocation and maintain performance stability even under heavy network load. Together, these capabilities make the UniFi Dream Router 5G Max a reliable solution for secure and intelligent network management.

detailed_description.heading: Powerful Hardware
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Dream Router 5G Max combines powerful hardware with flexible connectivity options in a compact desktop design. It features a 4-port 2.5 GbE switch, allowing high-speed wired connections for multiple devices, while one port supports Power over Ethernet with a budget of 15.4W. This enables direct powering of compatible devices such as access points or cameras without additional power supplies. For high-capacity uplinks, the device includes a 10G SFP+ port, providing fast connectivity to advanced network infrastructure or aggregation switches. This makes it suitable for environments that require scalable and future-ready wired performance. The system supports up to four WAN connections, offering flexibility for load balancing or failover configurations.

detailed_description.heading: Powerful Hardware (Part 2)
detailed_description.text: The hardware is powered by a quad-core ARM processor with 3 GB of system memory, ensuring smooth operation across multiple applications and connected devices. It also includes a 4.7 inch touchscreen display for quick status monitoring and local management, adding convenience to everyday operation. For storage, the device includes a pre-installed 64 GB microSD card and supports replacement or expansion using the same microSD slot. This enables local data storage for applications such as network video recording or system logs. Combined with its durable polycarbonate enclosure and efficient thermal design, the UniFi Dream Router 5G Max delivers reliable performance in a compact and practical form factor.
